negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: industry_092
prompt: The video opens with a close-up of a person's hands meticulously working on a piece of intricately carved wood. The hands, steady and skilled, hold a hammer and tap into the wood, focusing on driving a nail into place. The detailed floral and geometric patterns on the wood are highlighted, showcasing the craftsmanship involved. The background is softly blurred, revealing a well-lit room with large windows allowing natural light to stream in, creating a serene and focused atmosphere. Various objects, including a lamp and some plants, are faintly visible, suggesting a cozy and artistic workspace. The person's hands move methodically, applying precise taps with the hammer, gradually securing the nail into the wood. The video progresses through several frames, each capturing the intricate handiwork and the evolving beauty of the wooden piece. By the final frame, the hands continue their careful tapping, emphasizing the dedication and skill required in this craft.
